package_salary.ppo_ctc: Fixed Pay: ₹20,100 per month · Night Shift Allowance: Up to ₹3,000 · Monthly Performance Bonus: Up to ₹7,000 (you perform, you earn) · Wi‑Fi Reimbursement: Up to ₹1,000 · Upselling Incentives: No cap – more skills = more money · Insurance Cover: Mediclaim ₹2L | Accident ₹13.6L | Life ₹17L · Company Cab: ₹1,250 monthly deduction · Time Off: 24 Paid Leaves + 11 Holidays + 2 Weekly Offs
